```{r}
sum(is.na(values(Slo00_5km_clip)))  # check missing pixels
# 9. Create metadata
slo_values <- values(Slo00_5km_clip)
slo_nonNA <- slo_values[!is.na(slo_values)]
Slope_metadata <- list(
  variable = "Slope",   
  year = 2000,
  units = "degrees",
  source = "Digital Elevation Models (DEMs)",
  spatial_resolution_km = 5,
  crs = crs(Slo00_5km_clip),
  n_rows = nrow(Slo00_5km_clip),
  n_cols = ncol(Slo00_5km_clip),
  n_cells_total = ncell(Slo00_5km_clip),
  n_cells_valid = sum(!is.na(values(Slo00_5km_clip))),
  n_cells_missing = sum(is.na(values(Slo00_5km_clip))),
  min = min(slo_nonNA),
  max = max(slo_nonNA),
  mean = mean(slo_nonNA),
  sd = sd(slo_nonNA),
  skewness = skewness(slo_nonNA),
  transformation = "log1p",
  standardization = "z-score",
  extreme_handling = "Z-scores capped at ±5",
  processing_notes = "Cropped, masked, Z-score standardized, log1p transformed"
)
jsonlite::write_json(
  Slope_metadata, 
  "D:/new resea/Ethiopia/each year/2000/Adjusted_Raster/Slo00_5km_metadata.json",
  pretty = TRUE
)
cat("Slope metadata saved\n")
# 10. Save final raster
writeRaster(
  Slo00_5km_clip,
  "D:/new resea/Ethiopia/each year/2000/Adjusted_Raster/Slo00_5km.tif",
  overwrite = TRUE
)
```

```{r worldpop}

# WORLD POPULATION (UNDER-5) AGGREGATION TO 5km TEMPLATE
# For under-five mortality rate calculation (denominator)
cat("\n=== WORLD POPULATION AGGREGATION (2000) ===\n")

# 1. Load libraries and template
library(terra)
library(sf)
library(exactextractr)
library(jsonlite)
library(e1071)

template_path <- "D:/new resea/Ethiopia/zz template/template_5km_ethiopia.tif"
pop_100m_path <- "D:/new resea/Ethiopia/population/Pop_00.tif"
output_dir <- "D:/new resea/Ethiopia/each year/2000/Adjusted_Raster"
output_file <- file.path(output_dir, "Pop00_5km.tif")
metadata_file <- file.path(output_dir, "Pop00_5km_metadata.json")
diagnostic_file <- file.path(output_dir, "Pop00_5km_diagnostics.csv")

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# 2. Load template and 100m population
ref <- rast(template_path)
pop_100m <- rast(pop_100m_path)
cat("Template and 100m population loaded.\n")

# 3. Convert template to polygons (in same CRS as population)
ref_wgs <- project(ref, crs(pop_100m))
polys_wgs <- as.polygons(ref_wgs, dissolve = FALSE)
ref_sf <- st_as_sf(polys_wgs)

# 4. Aggregate using exact_extract (sum of population per 5km cell)
pop_sum_values <- exact_extract(pop_100m, ref_sf, fun = "sum")

# 5. Create 5km population raster
pop_5km <- ref
values(pop_5km)[!is.na(values(pop_5km))] <- pop_sum_values

# 6. Diagnostics
pop_vals <- values(pop_5km)
pop_vals_nonNA <- pop_vals[!is.na(pop_vals)]
diagnostics <- data.frame(
  variable = "Pop00_5km",
  year = 2000,
  source = "WorldPop",
  original_resolution = "100m",
  aggregation_method = "sum (exact_extract)",
  n_cells_total = ncell(pop_5km),
  n_cells_valid = length(pop_vals_nonNA),
  n_cells_missing = sum(is.na(pop_vals)),
  min = min(pop_vals_nonNA, na.rm = TRUE),
  max = max(pop_vals_nonNA, na.rm = TRUE),
  sum = sum(pop_vals_nonNA, na.rm = TRUE),
  mean = mean(pop_vals_nonNA, na.rm = TRUE),
  sd = sd(pop_vals_nonNA, na.rm = TRUE),
  skewness = skewness(pop_vals_nonNA, na.rm = TRUE),
  percent_zeros = 100 * sum(pop_vals_nonNA == 0) / length(pop_vals_nonNA),
  processing_date = as.character(Sys.Date()),
  processed_by = Sys.info()["user"]
)
write.csv(diagnostics, diagnostic_file, row.names = FALSE)
cat("Diagnostics saved to:", diagnostic_file, "\n")

# 7. Metadata JSON
metadata <- list(
  variable_name = "Under-five population count",
  variable_code = "Pop00_5km",
  year = 2000,
  country = "Ethiopia",
  source = "WorldPop",
  source_url = "https://www.worldpop.org/",
  original_units = "persons per 100m grid cell",
  final_units = "persons per 5km grid cell",
  aggregation = "sum of 100m cells within each 5km cell",
  spatial_resolution_m = paste(res(pop_5km), collapse = " x "),
  crs = as.character(crs(pop_5km)),
  n_cells_total = ncell(pop_5km),
  n_cells_valid = length(pop_vals_nonNA),
  n_cells_missing = sum(is.na(pop_vals)),
  total_population = sum(pop_vals_nonNA, na.rm = TRUE),
  mean_cell_population = mean(pop_vals_nonNA, na.rm = TRUE),
  median_cell_population = median(pop_vals_nonNA, na.rm = TRUE),
  min_cell_population = min(pop_vals_nonNA, na.rm = TRUE),
  max_cell_population = max(pop_vals_nonNA, na.rm = TRUE),
  skewness = skewness(pop_vals_nonNA, na.rm = TRUE),
  processing_date = as.character(Sys.Date()),
  software = list(R_version = R.version.string, terra_version = as.character(packageVersion("terra")))
)
write_json(metadata, metadata_file, pretty = TRUE, auto_unbox = TRUE)
cat("Metadata saved to:", metadata_file, "\n")

# 8. Save raster
writeRaster(pop_5km, output_file, gdal = "COMPRESS=LZW", overwrite = TRUE)
cat("Population raster saved to:", output_file, "\n")
cat("=== POPULATION AGGREGATION COMPLETE ===\n")
```

```{r inhabited areas}
# INHABITED AREAS MASK (5km) – ETHIOPIA 2000
# Based on: NDVI >= 0.1, land (not water), population >= 1

cat("\n=== INHABITED AREAS MASK (2000) ===\n")

library(terra)
library(sf)
library(jsonlite)
library(e1071)

template_path <- "D:/new resea/Ethiopia/zz template/template_5km_ethiopia.tif"
ndvi_path <- "D:/U5M/NDVI Ethiopia/NDVI_2000_Ethiopia.tif"
water_path <- "D:/shap/ethio waterbody.tif"
pop_path <- "D:/U5M/population/Pop00_5km.tif"   # use the newly created 5km population
output_dir <- "D:/new resea/Ethiopia/each year/2000/Adjusted_Raster"
output_mask <- file.path(output_dir, "inhabit00_5km.tif")
metadata_file <- file.path(output_dir, "inhabit00_5km_metadata.json")
diagnostic_file <- file.path(output_dir, "inhabit00_5km_diagnostics.csv")

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# 1. Load template
template <- rast(template_path)
cat("Template loaded.\n")

# 2. NDVI mask (>= 0.1)
cat("\n--- NDVI mask ---\n")
ndvi_raw <- rast(ndvi_path)
if (nlyr(ndvi_raw) > 1) ndvi_raw <- ndvi_raw[[1]]
# Scale if MODIS (0-10000 scale → 0-1)
if (minmax(ndvi_raw)[2] > 1) ndvi_raw <- ndvi_raw * 0.0001
ndvi_proj <- project(ndvi_raw, template, method = "bilinear")
ndvi_mask <- ifel(ndvi_proj >= 0.1, 1, NA)
cat("NDVI mask: inhabited cells =", sum(values(ndvi_mask) == 1, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

# 3. Water mask (0 = land, 1 = water)
cat("\n--- Water mask ---\n")
water <- rast(water_path)[[1]]
water_proj <- project(water, template, method = "near")
land_mask <- ifel(water_proj == 0, 1, NA)   # 1 = land, NA = water
cat("Land mask: land cells =", sum(values(land_mask) == 1, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

# 4. Population mask (>= 1 person)
cat("\n--- Population mask ---\n")
pop_5km <- rast(pop_path)
pop_mask <- ifel(pop_5km >= 1, 1, NA)
cat("Population mask: inhabited cells =", sum(values(pop_mask) == 1, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

# 5. Align all masks (resample to template to be safe)
ndvi_mask <- resample(ndvi_mask, template, method = "near")
land_mask <- resample(land_mask, template, method = "near")
pop_mask  <- resample(pop_mask,  template, method = "near")

# 6. Combine (logical AND)
inhabit_mask <- app(c(ndvi_mask, land_mask, pop_mask), fun = function(x) {
  if (all(x == 1, na.rm = TRUE)) 1 else NA
})
cat("Final inhabited mask: cells =", sum(values(inhabit_mask) == 1, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

# 7. Diagnostics
mask_vals <- values(inhabit_mask)
total_cells <- sum(!is.na(values(template)))
inhabited_cells <- sum(mask_vals == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
diagnostics <- data.frame(
  variable = "inhabit00_5km",
  year = 2000,
  method = "NDVI >= 0.1 AND land (water == 0) AND population >= 1",
  total_5km_cells = total_cells,
  inhabited_cells = inhabited_cells,
  percent_inhabited = 100 * inhabited_cells / total_cells,
  ndvi_threshold = 0.1,
  water_mask = "land only (water == 0)",
  population_threshold = ">= 1 person",
  processing_date = as.character(Sys.Date()),
  processed_by = Sys.info()["user"]
)
write.csv(diagnostics, diagnostic_file, row.names = FALSE)
cat("Diagnostics saved to:", diagnostic_file, "\n")

# 8. Metadata JSON
metadata <- list(
  variable_name = "Inhabited areas mask",
  variable_code = "inhabit00_5km",
  year = 2000,
  country = "Ethiopia",
  definition = "Cells classified as inhabited if: (1) NDVI >= 0.1, (2) land (not water), (3) population >= 1",
  data_sources = list(
    NDVI = "MODIS (scaled 0-1)",
    water = "Global Surface Water (ESA)",
    population = "WorldPop aggregated to 5km"
  ),
  spatial_resolution_m = paste(res(inhabit_mask), collapse = " x "),
  crs = as.character(crs(inhabit_mask)),
  n_cells_total = total_cells,
  n_cells_inhabited = inhabited_cells,
  percent_inhabited = round(100 * inhabited_cells / total_cells, 2),
  processing_steps = c(
    "Project all inputs to template CRS",
    "Resample to 5km template",
    "Create binary masks: NDVI>=0.1, land=1, pop>=1",
    "Combine with logical AND"
  ),
  processing_date = as.character(Sys.Date()),
  software = list(R_version = R.version.string, terra_version = as.character(packageVersion("terra")))
)
write_json(metadata, metadata_file, pretty = TRUE, auto_unbox = TRUE)
cat("Metadata saved to:", metadata_file, "\n")

# 9. Save final mask
writeRaster(inhabit_mask, output_mask, gdal = "COMPRESS=LZW", overwrite = TRUE)
cat("Inhabited mask saved to:", output_mask, "\n")
cat("=== INHABITED MASK COMPLETE ===\n")
```
